skills.name: API Client Generator
skills.description: Generate type-safe API client code from OpenAPI specs or endpoint descriptions.
skills.promptPreview: Generate a TypeScript API client for [API/endpoints]. Include request/response types, error handling, and authentication headers.

skills.name: Webhook Handler Scaffolder
skills.description: Scaffold webhook receivers with signature verification, payload parsing, and retry logic.
skills.promptPreview: Scaffold a webhook handler for [service] webhooks. Include signature verification, payload parsing, idempotency, and error handling.

skills.name: Third-Party SDK Wrapper
skills.description: Create clean wrapper modules around third-party SDKs with error handling and logging.
skills.promptPreview: Create a wrapper module for [SDK/library]. Include initialisation, error handling, logging, and a clean public API surface.
